title: haplophyllum buxbaumii subsp. buxbaumii
intro: Haplophyllum buxbaumii subsp. buxbaumii, also known as Haplophyllum buxbaumii, is a plant species in the Rutaceae family, native to the Mediterranean region and Middle East. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Haplophyllum buxbaumii subsp. buxbaumii include its ability to relieve congestion, reduce fever, and promote a healthy immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
